metadata.thoughts:
**Extracting strike data**

I need to output JSON based on the strike extraction schema. The document indicates an upcoming strike on March 22, 2025, lasting 4 hours from 19:40 to 23:40. It definitely announces a strike, so I will set isStrike to true. I’ll extract vital data like startDate (2025-03-22 19:40:00), endDate (2025-03-22 23:40:00), and locationType, which can be "REGIONAL" or "NATIONAL". I'll also include guaranteed times in my data.
